analysis: The project appears to be a static website with a focus on black holes, featuring interactive elements, animations, and a cosmic theme. The existing files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the main content, with additional files for GitHub Pages and documentation. The current theme is dark and cosmic, with animations for black hole visuals and swirling effects. However, the CSS and JavaScript files need completion to fully implement the intended theme and functionality. The HTML file also requires additional sections and mobile-friendly navigation.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
